arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski Arsenal and Real Madrid are both keeping close tabs on Valencia’s highly rated centre-back Yarek Gasiorowski, with the Spain U19 international attracting widespread attention across Europe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'in contact' with 29-year-old Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly in talks with Bayern Munich and Germany midfielder Joshua Kimmich over a potential transfer to the Bernabeu in 2025.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder will prioritise Real Madrid offer – contact confirmed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich look to have won the battle for Alphonso Davies signature, but while it is not the same level of priority, they have a fresh war for the affections of Joshua Kimmich. arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Tchouaméni fit, Camavinga back next week
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Friday provided updates on the wellbeing of two headline members of his squad. The pair in question? Aurélien Tchouaméni, and Eduardo Camavinga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s Carlo Ancelotti shuts down transfer speculation – ‘I have direct information from the player’
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has made it as clear as he can possibly could that star player Vinicius Junior is content at the club. The Brazilian continues to be linked with a move to Saudi Arabia, with the Middle Eastern oil money set to come back for him this summer again. arts.ttl: Real Madrid considering pursuit of second Liverpool defender amid contract talks
arts.sum: Real Madrid have had good success poaching some of the world’s best players on free transfers, and all of the talk is that Trent Alexander-Arnold will be the next to arrive at the Santiago Bernabeu without a transfer fee being paid.
